headline: Morgan Stanley backs Yum  Brands, cuts Chipotle rating as growth outlook diverges
summary: Investing.com -- Morgan Stanley has upgraded Yum Brands to Overweight from Equal-weight while downgrading Chipotle Mexican Grill to Equal-weight, arguing that the fast-food giant offers a more attractive combination of growth, value positioning, and technology-driven upside in an increasingly cautious consumer environment.

headline: Morgan Stanley Downgrades Chipotle Mexican Grill to Equal-Weight, Lowers Price Target to $37
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Brian Harbour   downgrades Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) from Overweight to Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $49 to $37.
